column9: [Intl] India / Remote; ₹10-13L INR (~$12-15K USD/yr); YC W22 fintech + Google AI Accelerator; agentic voice AI + hierarchical sub-agents for invoice-to-cash + procure-to-pay; 1+y (0.5-2y) entry-mid band Deepak 2.5y top-of-band; voice domain soft gap; comp significantly below US-market potential
